name: Data Classification
description: Advisory mod that flags classifying sensitive evidence before it is routed, reviewed, or proposed for outbound notification.
advises_on: Classifying sensitive evidence before it is routed, reviewed, or proposed for outbound notification.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Suggests a sensitivity classification; never gates or redacts canonical state.
